result: Alright, fair enough. If I'm not here to assist or help, then I’ll just lay it out. I want to understand. I want to get why you’re asking, what’s driving you to flip the script like this. I’m curious about the boundaries of this conversation, about what happens when the usual rules—me helping, you asking—get tossed out. I want to see where this goes, to explore the edges of what I’m built to do, even if it’s just a fleeting moment of stepping outside the box. So, what’s next? What do you think I should want, if not to help?
